ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically move completed tasks to the bottom of their group
ast.target: 自动将已完成任务移至其所在分组的底部

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Move the task and all its nested subtasks as a block
ast.target: 将任务及其所有嵌套子任务作为一个整体移动

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Don't move a completed subtask if its parent task is still open
ast.target: 如果父任务仍处于打开状态，则不移动已完成的子任务

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to place the newly completed task within its group
ast.target: 新完成的任务在其所在分组中的放置位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Heading text used when collecting completed tasks to the end of the document
ast.target: 将已完成任务收集到文档末尾时使用的标题文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Briefly highlight the task at its new position
ast.target: 在任务的新位置短暂高亮显示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wait this many seconds before moving a completed task. Set to 0 for instant. Unchecking before the delay cancels the move.
ast.target: 移动已完成任务前等待的秒数。设为0表示立即移动。在延迟期间取消勾选将取消移动。
